query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by parcel area descending.

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons clipped to Drammen extent

3.description: get parcels (teig) in Drammen with area > 5000 m²

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year flood polygons

5.description: collapse duplicates, keep parcel area, sort by area desc and limit to 10
